Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admission As Admitted
Off Calendar Jun-20-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
William Bellor-Yeh, Esq. for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Not argued. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admission As Admitted.

The Motion is granted. The truth of the matters specified in Plaintiff's Request for Admissions are deemed admitted.

Plaintiff/Prevailing party to send proposed order tracking the adopted ruling of the court via email to tom@thomascohen.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
